get.summary: Queries the bases list
Queries the bases list with minimal properties (lite version)
Queries the bases list by FarmId (required) and SystemTypeId for existing addresses (uri to a device)

post.summary:
Creates a new base unit address.
When scheme any-desk is set, ServerAddress should contain a 9-digit any-desk identifier and PortNumber should not be set

get.summary: Gets a specific base by ID

patch.summary: Modifies a base unit using JSON Patch (RFC 6902)

delete.summary: Removes a base from the base's collection.

get.summary: Gets a specific base address by ID (unitId)

patch.summary: Modifies a base unit address using JSON Patch (RFC 6902) by ID (unitId)

post.summary:
Upserts a base unit address.
Supports partial updates: properties not included in JSON are kept as is, properties explicitly set to null are updated to null.
Trigger from FlowLive - update IP address based on a sim number with predefined token

get.summary: Queries the bases list with optional systemTypeId filter

post.summary: Add a device directly without provision flow

get.summary: Get third party connection by type
Gets all devices for farmIds
Gets a specific device by device ID
Gets Teltonika Remote Access URLs for all devices in a farm

post.summary:
Generates Teltonika remote access info for a specific device.
farmId is optional - if provided, the device must belong to that farm and the link will be saved to local DB.

parameters.name: farmId
parameters.description: Optional farm ID - if provided, device ownership is verified and the link is saved to local DB

get.summary: Gets list of Icons
Gets a specific IO device by ID

patch.summary: Modifies an IO device using JSON Patch (RFC 6902)

delete.summary:
Removes an IO device from the IO devices collection.
Also removes the channel as channel without an IO will be deleted

get.summary: Gets all channel ios, filter results by farm id, parent device serial number, channel port number, and io device type id
Queries the IO device types list
Gets a specific IO device type by ID
Gets a specific IO group by ID

delete.summary: Removes an IO group with its IO devices. Roles: SuperAdmin

post.summary: Creates new io group. Roles: SuperAdmin

get.summary: Gets all channel ios, filter results by parent device serial number, and channel port number
Get IO Types
Gets a specific IO Type by ID
Queries the remotes list
Gets a specific remote unit by ID

patch.summary: Modifies a remote unit using JSON Patch (RFC 6902)

delete.summary: Removes a remote from the remotes collection.

get.summary: Queries the repeaters list
Gets a specific repeater unit by ID

patch.summary: Modifies a repeater unit using JSON Patch (RFC 6902)

delete.summary: Removes a repeater from the repeaters collection.

get.summary: Queries the system types list
Gets a specific system type by ID
Get thresholds
Gets a specific base's tree by ID
Gets a specific unit's tree by unit device ID
Gets units' trees by farm

post.summary: Retrieves units’ trees for a collection of farms in one request.

requestBody.description:
A list of farm identifiers string.
The endpoint ignores duplicates.

get.summary: Queries the unit types list
Gets a specific unit type by ID

deviceName.description: Name of the device, given by the user . for example : " RTU almonds east"

latitude.description: Latitude of geolocation of the device

longitude.description: Longitude of geolocation of the device

channels.description: Channels to connect IO devices to this base unit

failReason.description:
When IsLinkValid is false, describes why the link cannot be used.
Possible values: "Device is offline", "Device is not connected to RMS", "Unknown reason".
Null when the device is not a Teltonika (NetCrtplc) device.

deviceName.description: Name of the device, given by the user

systemType.description: System type of the unit (as integer value)

BaseGetLiteResponseDto.description: Lite version of base device unit with minimal properties

deviceName.description: Name of the device, given by the user . for example : " RTU almonds east"

farmId.description: Farm to which the bases are connected to

ioTypeId.description:
Protocol for which an IO device is ported to the channel
AI RS232 RS485 SDI12 DI DO

ioDeviceTypeId.description:
AI - Sensor name e.x. sm150, Irrometer
DI - Water Meter name, Dry Contact Name
DO - Valve name, Pump name
SI - Serial sensor name

depth.description:
Depth of the IO in the channel if more than one in the channel
In Sensors: If this sensor belong to group of sensors - this is the depth of the sensor in the group

offset.description: Offset to adjust the value by linear transformation

multiplier.description: Multiplier to adjust the value by linear transformation

minValue.description: Minimum value of the IO defined by the Manufacture

maxValue.description: Maximum value of the IO defined by the Manufacture

portDescription.description: Exists in the eco topology message

ChannelCreateRequestDto.description: Device and port of a unit for devices to connect

unitId.description: Parent unit into which the channel is installed

ioTypeId.description:
Idetifier of protocol for which an IO device is ported to the channel
AI RS232 RS485 SDI12 DI DO

ioDeviceTypeId.description: Io device type assosiated with this IO group, which may be different then its children IOs' device types

ios.description: created IO devices within the IO group

id.description: Id of the created io group

items.description: Items assigned to the IO Group

ioTypeId.description:
Idenifier of protocol for which an IO device is ported to the channel
AI RS232 RS485 SDI12 DI DO

name.description: Unique name of the IO defined by the end user

portDescription.description: Exists in the eco topology message

depth.description:
Depth of the IO in the Io group if more than one in the channel
In Sensors: If this sensor belong to group of sensors - this is the depth of the sensor in the group

installedDepth.description: Real depth that IO is installed at

offset.description: Offset to adjust the value by linear transformation

multiplier.description: Multiplier to adjust the value by linear transformation

minValue.description: Minimum value of the IO defined by the Manufacture

maxValue.description: Maximum value of the IO defined by the Manufacture

deviceId.description: Identifier of the physical unit to which the IO is connected

thingId.description: Unit of measurement to override the default ThingId in the device type

uom.description: IO type ID to override the default IoTypeId in the device type

subChannel.description: Sub channel that is mapped by the adaptor to this IO

deviceId.description: Identifier of the physical device whose topology should be refreshed

farmId.description: Identifier of the farm in which the devices resides

deviceName.description: Name of the device, given by the user .

latitude.description: Latitude of geolocation of the device

longitude.description: Longitude of geolocation of the device

channels.description: Channels to connect IO devices to this remote unit

deviceName.description: Name of the device, given by the user . for example : " RTU almonds east"

farmId.description: Farm to which the remotes are connected to

baseId.description: Base to which the remotes are connected to

deviceName.description: Name of the device, given by the user .

latitude.description: Latitude of geolocation of the device

longitude.description: Longitude of geolocation of the device

deviceName.description: Name of the device, given by the user . for example : " RTU almonds east"

farmId.description: Farm to which the remotes are connected to

baseId.description: Base to which the repeaters are connected to

modemSerial.description: The modem serial number used to look up the device in Teltonika RMS

TeltonikaGenerateRequestDto.description: Request body for generating Teltonika remote access info

deviceId.description: The device ID passed in the request

modemSerial.description: The modem serial passed in the request

modemDeviceId.description: Teltonika internal device ID (from modem serial lookup)

failReason.description: Non-null when generation failed for a known reason (e.g. "Multiple accessId for the device"). Null on success.

TeltonikaGenerateResponseDto.description: Response with full Teltonika remote access information

isLinkValid.description: Indicates whether the link is valid and the device is reachable

failReason.description:
When IsLinkValid is false, describes why the link cannot be used.
Possible values: "Device is offline", "Device is not connected to RMS", "Unknown reason".

TeltonikaRemoteAccessUrlDto.description: Represents Teltonika remote access URL information for a device

deviceName.description: Name of the device, given by the user . for example : " RTU almonds east"

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. 

 
                      Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.
                      

Example: 'Bearer 12345abcdef'
Bearer.name: Authorization
